response.justification: Candidate is a seasoned full-stack engineer with strong testing discipline and diverse language experience, but the resume shows minimal recent Java/Kotlin work and no Spring, Quarkus, or Hibernate exposure. Their depth is in TypeScript/Node.js and DLang, with Java mentioned only in passing for older robotics/orchestration projects. There is no evidence of IDE internals or language tooling work beyond a brief stint writing C/C++ components for NI LabWindows/CVI a decade ago, which is a weak match for an enterprise JVM IDE role.
strengths: Prior IDE component development experience at National Instruments (LabWindows/CVI)
Strong software craftsmanship background (TDD, CI/CD, pairing, trunk-based development)
Proven ability to work across complex, large-scale systems and multiple languages
concerns: No demonstrated Spring, Quarkus, or Hibernate experience
Java/Kotlin exposure is shallow and dated; primary stack is TypeScript and DLang
No evidence of deep JVM internals or modern language-tooling work

key_factors.factor: Prior IDE tooling experience at NI
